text.description: The text content to be converted to speech.

container.description: The file format wrapper for the output audio. The available options depend on the encoding type.

encoding.description: Specifies the expected encoding of your audio output

credits_used.description: The number of tokens consumed during generation.

usd_spent.description: The total amount of money spent by the user in USD.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl -L \
  --request POST \
  --url 'https://api.aimlapi.com/v1/tts' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_AIMLAPI_KEY>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '{
      "model": "#g1_aura-angus-en",
      "text": "Cities of the future promise to radically transform how people live, work, and move. Instead of sprawling layouts, we will see vertical structures that integrate residential, work, and public spaces into single, self-sustaining ecosystems. Architecture will adapt to climate conditions, and buildings will be energy-efficient—generating power through solar panels, wind turbines, and even foot traffic."
    }'
